llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm (ChatGPT treatment) vs. control; straightforward selection.
llm_extracted.notes: Control mean is 27 minutes. Paper reports '10 minutes reduction (37% faster)' which implies treatment mean = 27 - 10 = 17 minutes. The 95% CI [-0.63, -1.03] appears to be for Cohen's d (standardized effect), not for the percent change. SDs not reported but Cohen's d = -0.83 is available for effect size calculation.
source_quotes: In the treatment group, time taken on the post-treatment task drops by 10 minutes (37%) relative to the control group, who take an average of 27 minutes (p = 0.000).

computed.notes: Control mean is 27 minutes. Paper reports '10 minutes reduction (37% faster)' which implies treatment mean = 27 - 10 = 17 minutes. The 95% CI [-0.63, -1.03] appears to be for Cohen's d (standardized effect), not for the percent change. SDs not reported but Cohen's d = -0.83 is available for effect size calculation. | SDs/SEs missing; variance not computable
